title: viola beraudii subsp. adriatica
intro: Viola beraudii subsp. adriatica, also known as the Adriatic yellow gentian or Adriatic yellow violet, is a subspecies of the Viola beraudii plant, belonging to the violet family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola beraudii subsp. adriatica are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic agent. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used topically in creams and ointments, making it a versatile natural remedy.
